items.name_cn:
LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ Small Model 3901
рЯЖХ Nappa Squeeze Handbag рЯСЬ A refined and feminine new handbag made from soft-touch Nappa leather. This piece is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight crumpled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft touch handle. This small version is crafted from Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend strap further *Magnetic snap closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.
size:29*10.5*24CM All steel hardware

items.name_en: LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
items.name_cn:
LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
*Three carrying ways* Short handle, detachable shoulder, and crossbody strap
*Zipper with two leather pulls*
*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic closure*
*Flat pocket inside*
*D-ring on the left for customization*
*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot stamping or silver stamping, Double L embossed brand logoрЯМЯ
size:24.5*10*18.5CM
Model:262552

items.name_en: LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ Soft Nappa Leather Flamenco Purse Bucket Bag. Features a ruffled design with key details like the signature knot on the side. The Bucket bag introduces a new size for daily use while retaining the series' graceful style. Stylish and versatile, it can be worn with the donut chain strap or slung over the shoulder with the leather strap. This version is made of soft Nappa leather. Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Removable and adjustable leather strap* Removable donut chain charm* Anagram embossed pebbled leather* Discreet magnetic closure* Suede lining, gold or silver foil stamping*(Matching metal chain extension leather shoulder strap)

items.name_en: LOвДЃwвДЃрЯМЯ The Puzzle Handbag is Jonathan Anderson's first tote for LOEWE. The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create Puzzle's distinctive geometric lines. The large version is made of pressed suede, featuring overlapping edges and leather trim. Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld. Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap. External zip pocket. Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing.
